title: The Recruits' Drinking Match
target: hold a long night of drinking that closes ranks between the two newest hands without ending in a brawl

contributions.line: [mock] Marek (Male) takes on "out-drink the younger recruits without making it a contest of pride".
[mock] Dren (Male) takes on "keep the songs and stories rolling past the bitter hour".

outcomeNarrative: [mock] A bruised partial; hold a long night of drinking that closes ranks between the two newest hands without ending in a brawl slips half-grasped, but no one is broken.
